shows.name: Warrior Reborn
shows.description: Little girl dares challenge all, secretly the reborn God of War in disguise.

shows.name: Accidental Night, Fated Love
shows.description: One wrong step opens her heart, when the man she met becomes her company’s CEO.

shows.name: From Remedy To Romance
shows.description: A delivery girl becomes the CEO's antidote, and he unexpectedly falls in love with her at first sight.

shows.name: From Begger to Billionaire
shows.description: After betrayal, a woman marries a stranger, only to discover her beggar husband is secretly a CEO.

shows.name: Love That Heals
shows.description: One fateful night with a poor girl breaks the CEO’s allergy,she soon carries his triplets.

shows.name: The Village Bride & The CEO
shows.description: A fearless village girl marries a disguised CEO for survival, only to shake up his secret life while battling to save her village.

shows.name: The CEO's Unexpected Love
shows.description: After rejecting countless blind dates, a CEO falls for a kind hotel waitress, changing his heart forever.

shows.name: Treasure of Fate
shows.description: Thrown into the mountains by my cruel stepmother, I am the hidden treasure of four CEO uncles.

shows.name: Falling for Innocence
shows.description: All fake elegance fails to impress, but a hardworking 18-year-old intern captures the CEO’s frozen heart.

shows.name: The Delivery Girl's Secret
shows.description: Despising his wife for being a delivery girl, the CEO kicks her out, unaware she's the heir to a billionaire.
